rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §39.0824, which governs corrective action plans for low-rated school districts. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school assigned the lowest rating under Section 39.082 shall submit to the commissioner a corrective action plan to address the financial weaknesses of the district or school.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns school district corrective action plans, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
